    Methods in doghotel with parameters of type Date
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    DogHotel.backup(String fileName, Date today)
    This method is complete DO NOT CHANGE
    Backs up the current hotel guests into a data file.
    Since the computer system is powered down at night, we
    need to write the current guests out to a file that can be
    read in the next morning.
    double
    Date.difference(Date that)
    calculates the difference between two dates as an absolute value
    of the two day numbers.
